name: io.github.ashev87/propstack-mcp
description: MCP server for Propstack real estate CRM — connect AI assistants to your Propstack data (contacts, properties, deals, search profiles, tasks, email).

environmentVariables.name: PROPSTACK_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Your Propstack V1 API key (Verwaltung > API-Schluessel in crm.propstack.de). Determines which endpoints are accessible.
